value_picks.analyst_take: Breakthrough Therapy with BLA filing June 2026 and $25M insider buy — high-risk orphan drug with 100-200% upside if approved

catalysts_general: Q2 beat (EPS $1.26 vs $1.23). Revenue up 18% YoY. Guided 10-11% EPS growth. Q3 earnings due Mar 24-26. [Tier 2: Investing.com, MarketBeat]
value_picks.analyst_take: Defensive payroll franchise with 73% margins at rare 40%+ drawdown; Q3 earnings Mar 26 catalyst

catalysts_general: FDA accepted BLA resubmission with PDUFA Apr 10. Stock surged 86-98%. Wedbush Outperform $18. 33.7% SI creates squeeze. [Tier 1: GlobeNewswire/IR, Yahoo Finance]
value_picks.analyst_take: Classic binary biotech with PDUFA April 10 (31 days) and 34% SI — asymmetric if FDA approves RP1

catalysts_general: Q3 EPS beat. $1B buyback + 9% dividend hike. IRC 45X credits adding ~$0.93/share per quarter. Stock fell 13.8% despite beat. [Tier 2-3: Nasdaq, MarketBeat]

Discovery: Actively reshoring battery/power production to Richmond KY facility to mitigate tariff exposure + capture IRC 45X tax credits — FY2026 and FY2027 earnings estimates revised up 5.3% and 6.9% in last 60 days, benefiting from the $3T+ reshoring investment wave while remaining an under-followed mid-cap ($4B) that larger investors overlook.
value_picks.analyst_take: Underappreciated reshoring/data center power play at 14.1x fwd P/E with $1B buyback, though earnings quality depends on 45X tax credits

avoid_picks.analyst_take: P/E 370x on declining deliveries (-3.1% revenue), 18% gross margins compressing; pure narrative stock disconnected from fundamentals
894x D/E, -$4.6B FCF, $18.5B debt with doubling CDS spreads, securities fraud litigation — existential leverage risk
